title: Fix for Function in generate block results in "Broken link in node" crash (#7236)

features.name: function definition inside generate if-else block
features.description: Code should include a function defined inside a generate block with an if-else construct
features.snippet: generate if (1) begin : defs function foo; foo = '1; endfunction end else begin : defs function foo; foo = '0; endfunction end endgenerate

features.name: hierarchical function call via generate block scope
features.description: Code should include a hierarchical function call using a generate block's instance name path
